title: CP9 Battles in the Tower of Justice: Key Exchange
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Usopp, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #15 as the scene develops across pages 8–11.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Luffy, Usopp, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of cp9 battles in the tower of justice: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: whatever, just get these damn cuffs off.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: to sum it up....!! we're now...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In the same position as Robin...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: One of the CPP members has it...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then what? Would you rather fight together?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What!? You got me excited for nothing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Crap, we've gotta do some- thing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: idiot!!! Look at the damned hand- cuffs!!!

summary: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through Luffy, Usopp, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of cp9 battles in the tower of justice: key exchange.
